title: Antique Greenhouse Thermostat — recovering hidden hysteresis + actuation delay
strategies: constant heater value (ignores the drive) -> reproduces the checker baseline ~0.1

greedy: memoryless static curve y=off+amp*sig((thr-d)*g) fit to the slow training branch; near-perfect on train, but one heater value per drive value cannot express the two hysteresis branches and misses the actuation delay -> fails the fast held-out reversals

strong: notice residuals of the memoryless fit correlate with drive DIRECTION not VALUE; posit a Schmitt latch (recover band edges from where the latch flips while rising vs falling) plus a k-step delay (recover by the shift that best explains training); emit a stateful latch+delayed-tap DSL program that generalises to the fast regime
headroom above strong: model the unmodelled FRACTIONAL lag (blend two adjacent delayed latch taps) and refine the band/delay jointly to push held-out MSE toward the sensor-noise floor
